overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring an ancient Mediterranean stone fortress harbor. The character walks through stone corridors and wooden docks, boards a sailboat to circle the fortress walls, and disembarks to climb wooden stairs into the fortress interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone fortress corridor leading to harbor

events.description: exiting stone archway onto wooden dock platform

agents.ego_description: walking through stone corridors toward the harbor, passing wooden scaffolding and stone walls

entered.detail: ancient stone block wall forming the fortress corridor
ancient stone block wall forming the fortress corridor
rough timber scaffolding and beams overhead

wooden sailboats docked at the harbor pier

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone corridor of an ancient fortress, passing under wooden scaffolding. The stone walls frame the view of the turquoise harbor ahead, where wooden sailboats are moored at the dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor dock with moored boats

events.description: boarding the wooden sailboat at the dock

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock and stepping onto a moored sailboat

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the harbor dock
wooden sailboat with mast and canvas sail

segments.scene_description: The character walks onto the wooden dock planks and approaches a moored sailboat. The stone fortress walls fall behind as the character boards the vessel, with the wooden mast and canvas sail entering the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor water with coastal cliffs

events.description: sailboat accelerates away from the dock into open water
boat turns around to return toward the fortress

agents.ego_description: sailing the boat away from the fortress, circling around to view the coastal cliffs, then turning back toward the dock

entered.detail: expansive blue-green sea stretching to the horizon
tall rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation
small sailboats visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The sailboat glides away from the dock into open water, passing the canvas sail. The fortress recedes into the distance on the left while coastal cliffs appear on the right. The boat circles around, showing the open sea and distant ships, before turning back toward the fortress walls.

events.description: sailboat slows and docks at the wooden pier
character disembarks from boat onto wooden dock

agents.ego_description: docking the sailboat and stepping back onto the wooden pier

entered.detail: weathered wooden dock planks and posts

segments.scene_description: The sailboat approaches the fortress dock, slowing down to moor. The character disembarks onto the wooden planks as the open sea and cliffs fall behind, with the stone fortress walls now looming close again.

events.description: leaving dock area and entering stone staircase corridor

agents.ego_description: walking up wooden stairs between high stone fortress walls

entered.detail: rough wooden log stairs leading upward
earthen path alongside the wooden stairs

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dock behind, the character ascends rough wooden stairs flanked by towering stone fortress walls. The harbor and sailboat disappear from view as the path climbs upward into the fortress interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the enclosed stone corridors of an ancient fortress out across a turquoise harbor and back into the fortress interior. It begins by moving through a narrow stone passage under wooden scaffolding, where the view opens up to reveal sailboats moored at a dock. As the character steps onto the wooden planks and boards a vessel, the fortress walls recede and the scene expands into the open sea, gliding past a canvas sail toward distant coastal cliffs and ships. The camera then circles back toward the harbor, slowing as the boat moors and the character disembarks, bringing the towering stone walls back into close proximity. Finally, the path shifts from the waterfront to a steep ascent up rough wooden stairs, leaving the harbor behind as the view climbs upward into the heart of the fortress.
